announcements.title: Welcome to ACS
announcements.body:
Manage your AI agent stack from one place.

**What you can do:**
- Configure Claude Code CLI, Hermes profiles, and model routing from the Agentic Manager
- Start, stop, and monitor all gateways from Gateway Manager
- Auto-healing keeps your stack running — crashed services restart within 5 minutes
- Stack Manager tracks every component's health, uptime, and auto-start settings

**Coming soon:** Kanban task dispatch and Broker Mesh for inter-agent coordination.
announcements.quote: The best infrastructure is the one you forget is there — until you realize it's been saving you every single day.
